backup.backupplan.CfnAbout:
Contains an optional backup plan display name and an array of `BackupRule` objects, each of which specifies a backup rule. Each rule in a backup plan is a separate scheduled task and can back up a different selection of AWS resources.

For a sample AWS CloudFormation template, see the [AWS Backup Developer Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/aws-backup/latest/devguide/assigning-resources.html

backup.backupplan.BackupPlan.Description: Uniquely identifies the backup plan to be associated with the selection of resources.

backup.backupplan.BackupPlanTags.Description: To help organize your resources, you can assign your own metadata to the resources that you create. Each tag is a key-value pair. The specified tags are assigned to all backups created with this plan.
